name: PACKAGING CORP OF AMERICA
summary: PART I Item 1. B USINESS Packaging Corporation of America (we, us, our, PCA, or the Company) is the third largest producer of containerboard products and a leading producer of uncoated freesheet (UFS) paper in North America. We operate ten mills and 91 corrugated products plants and related facilities. We are headquartered in Lake Forest, Illinois and operate in the United States. We report in three reportable segments: Packaging, Paper and Corporate and Other. For segment financial information ...
